evals.prompt: I need intermediate CA for intermediate.internal.example using root-ca.pem and root-ca-key.pem.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused intermediate ca generator workflow for intermediate.internal.example using root-ca.pem and root-ca-key.pem; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
